title: Energy Markets Surge Higher Amid Further Curbs On Russian Gas
section_path: Energy Markets Surge Higher Amid Further Curbs On Russian Gas
section_path_text: Energy Markets Surge Higher Amid Further Curbs On Russian Gas
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Commodity markets were mixed as supply tightness amid a weakening economic backdrop saw large moves across metals and energy. Energy markets surged higher as Russia curbed gas supplies further. Dutch front month futures rallied more than 13% to end the session just shy of EUR200/MWh following Gazprom's announcement yesterday that gas flows through Nord Stream would be cut to 20% of capacity.
